data_dir.tooltip: Where prompts.json and backups are stored. Leave empty to use ~/.local/share/prompt-vault@alex/. You may use ~ for your home folder. Put a file named import.json here to import it.

auto_backup.description: Keep a rolling backup on every change
auto_backup.tooltip: Maintains prompts.auto-backup.json next to your data so a save can never lose your previous state.

enable_templates.tooltip: If a prompt contains {{name}} markers, you'll be asked to fill them in before the text is copied.

confirm_delete.tooltip: Show a confirmation dialog before a prompt is removed.

show_tags.tooltip: Display the prompt's tags in the list.

show_usage.description: Show how often each prompt is copied
show_usage.tooltip: Display a small 'Copied N×' line under each prompt.

list_height.tooltip: Height of the scrollable prompt list.
